_comment: Method-count ratchet. Fails ONLY IF a class grows past its baseline; never fails just for being over Sonar's limit. Pay debt down freely, then run `node cli/src/method-budget.js --update` to lock in the lower number. `baseline` is this guard's own consistent method count (see sonarReported for the value Sonar's S1448 reports — counting rules differ, but both move the same direction when a method is added/removed). `moduleFile` is relative to the com.etendoerp.go module root (resolved via --module-root / ETENDO_GO_ROOT / sibling default).

classes.label: NeoDefaultsService
classes.note: ETP-4083: Sonar S1448 flags 38 > 35 authorized. Ratchet frozen so it cannot grow while we extract methods into helpers/handlers.
